title: Verizon CEO 预计 AI 将取代大量客服岗位
full_text:
Jun 4th, 2026
Verizon CEO Sees AI Coming for Customer Service Jobs
Verizon CEO Daniel Schulman says AI could replace “a large percentage” of the company's customer service workforce. Speaking at the Bloomberg Tech Conference 2026 in San Francisco, Schulman also says that the technology is primed to handle routine customer requests like billing amounts and increases customer satisfaction when used but AI agents will also have to work together with human agents to satisfy many requests.

discovery_record.discovery_title: Verizon CEO 预计 AI 将取代大量客服岗位
discovery_record.discovery_summary: Verizon CEO Daniel Schulman 在旧金山举办的 Bloomberg Tech Conference 上表示，AI 可能取代公司"大量比例"的客服员工。他指出，AI 能够处理账单金额等常规客户请求，并在使用时提升客户满意度，但 AI 智能体需要与人类客服协作才能满足许多请求。

key_excerpts.text: Verizon CEO Daniel Schulman 在旧金山举办的 Bloomberg Tech Conference 上表示，AI 可能取代公司"大量比例"的客服员工。他指出，AI 能够处理账单金额等常规客户请求，并在使用时提升客户满意度，但 AI 智能体需要与人类客服协作才能满足许多请求。

Speaking at the Bloomberg Tech Conference 2026 in San Francisco, Schulman also says that the technology is primed to handle routine customer requests like billing amounts and increases customer satisfaction when used but AI agents will also have to work together with human agents to satisfy many requests.
